name: Trump Cake Mania
short_description: Be a hero President Trump in this 3rd person walking game. Collect new cryptos shitcoin and try to find birthday cake. Also beware deathly democratics items
detailed_description:
STORY:

3rd person walking game where player controls president Trump in fictional world. Trump mission is to collect his favorite crypto, shitcoin to get steam achievements and main mission is to find birthday cake which is hidden somewhere in big open world. Player character need avoid democratic flags which kills player immediately and spawn him to starting location. So can you find all items and finish this big open world walking and surviving game.

FEATURES:

- open world

- Steam achievements

  • Collect shitcoin cryptos to get steam achievements

  • Find birthday cake to finish game

  • Beware democratic flags which kills president Trump and spawn him starting location

DISCLAIMER

This game is a work of fiction. Names, characters, places and events are the products of the authors’ imagination. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental.
